# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="template" attrs=[]
        #template-contents
          element ns=html local="div" attrs=[]
            "x"
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: eof-in-template
